info.title: Blockchain Freelance Marketplace API
info.description: A decentralized freelance marketplace with AI skill matching and blockchain payments

didit_session_url.description: URL to redirect user for verification

matchedSkills.description: Skills that matched between freelancer and project

missingSkills.description: Required skills the freelancer is missing

reasoning.description: AI explanation for the match score

skillId.description: ID of the extracted skill in taxonomy

url.description: Supabase Storage URL of the uploaded file

score.description: Weighted average score with time decay

hasMore.description: Whether there are more results available

continuationToken.description: Token for fetching the next page

description.example: Skills related to web development technologies

categoryId.description: ID of the category this skill belongs to

categoryName.description: Name of the category this skill belongs to

get.summary: Get comprehensive analytics data for admin dashboard
Get public platform statistics (no auth required)

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns authentication tokens
Authenticates a user and returns JWT tokens
Verifies MFA code and completes the login process
Uses a refresh token to obtain new access and refresh tokens

get.description: Handles OAuth redirect. For PKCE flow (code in query), exchanges code for tokens. For implicit flow (tokens in fragment), extracts and processes tokens.

post.description: Authenticates a user using a Supabase access token calling our backend to sync user and get app tokens

get.description: Redirects to Supabase OAuth provider

post.description: Receives access_token from frontend after OAuth redirect (when tokens are in URL fragment)

access_token.description: Supabase access token from OAuth redirect

post.description: Finalize account creation for a new OAuth user by providing a role and optionally wallet address
Resends the email verification link to the user
Sends a password reset email to the user

get.description: Returns a CSRF token for use in subsequent state-changing requests

csrfToken.description: CSRF token to include in X-CSRF-Token header

post.description: Updates the user password using the reset token

accessToken.description: Access token from password reset email

post.description: Invalidates the current user session and tokens
Initiates MFA enrollment and returns QR code for authenticator app

qrCode.description: QR code data URL for authenticator app

post.description: Verifies the TOTP code to complete MFA enrollment
Creates an MFA challenge for login verification
Verifies the TOTP code for an MFA challenge

get.description: Returns list of enrolled MFA factors for the user

post.description: Disables MFA for the user

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's information including KYC status
Retrieves all contracts for the authenticated user (as freelancer or employer)
Retrieves details of a specific contract

post.description: Creates a new Didit verification session and returns URL for user to complete verification

400.description: Validation error or user already has active verification

get.summary: Get current user's KYC verification status
Check if current user is verified
Get KYC data for profile creation
get.description: Returns verified KYC data that can be used to pre-populate user profile

400.description: KYC not approved or not found

post.description: Manually fetch latest status from Didit API
Receives verification status updates from Didit
Approve or reject a completed verification

get.description: Get all disputes (admin sees all, users see only their own)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

post.description: Create a dispute for a milestone, locking associated funds

400.description: Invalid request or milestone already disputed

403.description: User not authorized to create dispute

get.description: Get details of a specific dispute

post.description: Submit evidence to support a dispute case. Supports both multipart/form-data (server-side upload) and application/json (URL-reference pattern).

400.description: Invalid request, invalid UUID format, or dispute already resolved

403.description: User not authorized to submit evidence

post.description: Admin resolves a dispute, triggering payment based on decision

400.description: Invalid request, invalid UUID format, or dispute already resolved

403.description: User not authorized to resolve disputes

get.description: Get all disputes associated with a contract

403.description: User not authorized to view disputes

get.description: Retrieves all projects created by the authenticated employer with proposal counts
Retrieves the authenticated user's employer profile

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's employer profile

get.summary: Get employer profile by user ID
get.description: Retrieves an employer's public profile
Retrieves the authenticated user's freelancer profile

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's freelancer profile

post.description: Adds skills to the authenticated user's profile. Skills are stored as free-form text for AI matching.

yearsOfExperience.description: Years of experience with this skill

post.summary: Add work experience to freelancer profile
post.description: Adds a work experience entry to the authenticated user's profile

400.description: Validation error or invalid date range

delete.summary: Delete work experience from freelancer profile
delete.description: Removes a work experience entry from the authenticated user's profile

get.summary: Get freelancer profile by user ID
get.description: Retrieves a freelancer's public profile
Returns the health status of the API
Returns AI-powered project recommendations ranked by match score

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return

get.summary: Get freelancer recommendations for a project
get.description: Returns AI-powered freelancer recommendations ranked by combined skill and reputation score

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: ID of the project to find freelancers for (UUID)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of recommendations to return

post.description: Uses AI to extract and map skills from text to the platform taxonomy

get.description: Uses AI to analyze freelancer's skills and suggest improvements based on market demand
Retrieves all notifications for the authenticated user, sorted by creation time (newest first)

parameters.name: maxItemCount
parameters.description: Maximum number of notifications to return

get.description: Returns the count of unread notifications for the authenticated user

patch.description: Marks a specific notification as read
Marks all notifications for the authenticated user as read

200.description: All notifications marked as read successfully

count.description: Number of notifications marked as read

post.description: Freelancer marks a milestone as complete, triggering employer notification
Employer approves milestone completion, triggering payment release
Either party disputes a milestone, locking funds and creating a dispute record

get.description: Get detailed payment status for a contract including milestone statuses
Retrieves a list of open projects with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new project (employer only)

get.description: Retrieves all projects created by the authenticated employer
Retrieves details of a specific project

patch.description: Updates an existing project (employer only, project must not have accepted proposals)

400.description: Validation error or invalid UUID format

post.description: Sets milestones for a project (employer only, milestone amounts must sum to budget)

400.description: Validation error, invalid UUID format, or milestone sum mismatch

get.description: Retrieves all proposals for a specific project (employer only)
Retrieves project counts grouped by skill categories

post.description: Submit a proposal for a project with file attachments (freelancer only). Supports both multipart/form-data (server-side upload) and application/json (URL-reference pattern).

files.description: File attachments (1-5 files, max 10MB each, 25MB total)

attachments.description: File attachments (URL-reference pattern for backward compatibility)

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific proposal
Retrieves all proposals submitted by the authenticated freelancer

post.description: Accept a proposal and create a contract (employer only)

400.description: Invalid proposal status or UUID format

post.description: Reject a proposal (employer only)

400.description: Invalid proposal status or UUID format

post.description: Withdraw a pending proposal (freelancer only)

400.description: Invalid proposal status or UUID format

get.description: Check if the authenticated user can rate another user for a specific contract

post.description: Submit a rating for another user after contract completion. Rating must be between 1 and 5.

get.description: Retrieves the reputation score and ratings for a user from the blockchain

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to get reputation for (UUID)

get.description: Retrieves the work history for a user including completed contracts and ratings

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to get work history for (UUID)

get.description: Search for projects with keyword, skill, and budget filters

parameters.name: skills
parameters.description: Comma-separated skill IDs to filter by

get.description: Search for freelancers with keyword and skill filters

parameters.name: skills
parameters.description: Comma-separated skill IDs to filter by

get.description: Returns all active skill categories with their associated active skills in hierarchical format

post.description: Creates a new skill within a category. Requires admin privileges.

400.description: Validation error or category not found

409.description: Skill with this name already exists in the category

get.description: Returns skills matching the keyword in name or description, with category information

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Keyword to search for in skill names and descriptions

get.description: Returns all active skills for a specific category

post.description: Creates a new skill category. Requires admin privileges.

409.description: Category with this name already exists

patch.description: Marks a skill as inactive/deprecated. Deprecated skills are excluded from new profile and project associations. Requires admin privileges.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the skill to deprecate (UUID)

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of conversations for the authenticated user

post.description: Send a message to another user

get.description: Retrieve messages from a specific conversation

200.description: List of messages in the conversation

403.description: Forbidden - not a participant in this conversation

patch.description: Mark all messages in a conversation as read for the authenticated user

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: ID of the conversation to mark as read

get.description: Get the total number of unread messages for the authenticated user
